findings.claim: RESOLVED (PR #18, was BRISK-001 CRITICAL): boundary test evadable via module-then-attribute import (from invest.adapters import alpaca_broker + attribute access); strengthened with a shared _find_broker_references AST helper catching both patterns.

RESOLVED (PR #18, was BRES-001 CRITICAL): live fetch_range path could silently omit a universe symbol's data and report a complete-looking zero-signal backtest; now fails closed with symbol-missing-at-fetch, exit 2, no report printed.
OPEN follow-up (was BRISK-002): out-of-scope guard is filename-substring grep, evadable by a differently-named module implementing forbidden logic.
OPEN follow-up (was BRES-002): malformed-response conflates real schema failures with hitting MAX_PAGES with a still-valid next_page_token.
OPEN follow-up (was BRES-003): scan_decisions rescans the entire merged bar window per trading day, O(days x total_bars), unguarded for real multi-year backtests.

OPEN follow-ups (was BREAD-001..006): ExitReason StrEnum decorative vs hardcoded literals; four CLI entrypoints emit two incompatible failure shapes (third cycle flagging this pattern -- warrants a dedicated cleanup slice); duplicated OHLC validator across two adapters; minor missing type hints.
